description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a combination of beige and white exterior walls. The house has prominent white corner quoins and window trims, giving it a classic, slightly formal appearance. Large, multi-pane windows are symmetrically arranged on all visible sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. A covered porch with supporting columns and a set of steps leads to the main entrance, while a carport extends from one side, offering sheltered parking. The roofline is defined by a raised parapet, adding to the building's geometric, modern-classical look. The overall structure suggests a solid masonry or concrete build, typical of urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A two-story beige and white house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a covered porch, and a side carport, featuring classic trim details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the carport on the right, covered porch on the left, and symmetrical windows with white trim.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry steps, covered porch with columns, and large windows above and beside the entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a central window arrangement and no carport, emphasizing the building's symmetry and flat roof.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a long covered porch, steps, and multiple windows, with a simpler facade compared to the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, covered porch supported by columns, and a prominent overhang.
